title: salix cupularis var. cupularis
intro: Salix cupularis var. cupularis, also known as the Willow-leaf Willow, is a deciduous shrub or small tree that belongs to the willow family. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and analgesic properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Salix cupularis var. cupularis include relieving pain and reducing inflammation, as well as being used to treat fever, sore throat, and other respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or taken internally to reap its medicinal benefits.
